summary: Backend testing for P2 Feature Gating - Premium Feature Restrictions. All 34 tests passed. Verified 4 new feature gates (MULTIPLE_TRUSTS, GOVERNANCE_HISTORY, TRUST_UNITS, BENEFICIARY_DASHBOARD) returning 402 for trial users, plus regression tests for core features.

TestTrialUserCoreFeatures::test_trial_user_can_access_onboarding - PASS: Trial user can access onboarding (core)
TestFeatureFlagsEndpoint::test_new_premium_features_are_false_for_trial - PASS: All P2 features marked False for trial

governance.py: GOVERNANCE_HISTORY gate correctly implemented at line 442 using check_feature_access()
trust_units.py: TRUST_UNITS gate correctly implemented using require_premium_feature() dependency at lines 94, 326
server.py: BENEFICIARY_DASHBOARD gate correctly implemented at line 1729 using require_premium_feature()
dependencies.py: Feature class and PLAN_FEATURES correctly configured - trial has only core features, monthly/annual have all premium
